title: 更好的乐魂 BetterHappyGhast
description: 更改了快乐恶魂的脸部模型，让它看起来更可爱。Changed the face model of the Happy Ghast to make it look cuter.
body:
这是一个我的世界材质包，更改了快乐恶魂的脸部模型，它非常轻量化，能使你的快乐恶魂显得更可爱。
This is a Minecraft resource pack that modifies the face model of the Happy Ghast. It is extremely lightweight and makes your Happy Ghast look even cuter.
